About the Ministry

A Ministry with aHeart for Souls

Savior's Heartbeat Ministries exists to share the hope of Christ with people across India through evangelism, church planting, discipleship, and compassionate care.

Founded in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh in 1976, the ministry continues to serve villages and families through local churches, children's care, widows' support, gospel media, and the SPANDANA magazine.

Churches

Building local faith communities

Care

Serving children, widows, and families

Media

Carrying the Gospel through SPANDANA

About DevaBoard of Directors
Our Ministries

A Ministry with aHeart for Souls

From remote villages to hearts around the world, every ministry carries the same pulse: the Savior's Heartbeat.

01

Preaching the Gospel

Light in the Darkness: sharing Christ's hope with every soul.

Learn more
02

Conducting Pastors' Conferences

Equipping leaders and strengthening the hands of those who serve.

Learn more
03

Helping Pastors & Building Churches

Supporting local ministers and establishing pillars of faith in villages.

Learn more
04

Orphans & Poor Children

Giving children food, education, family, and a future filled with hope.

Learn more
05

Widows

Providing honor, dignity, comfort, and practical care for widows.

Learn more
06

Odisha Outreach

Reaching the unreached and bringing light to remote villages.

Learn more
07

SPANDANA Magazine

Telugu Christian publication blessing readers around the world since 1976.

Learn more
Charity & Impact

Changing Lives,One Soul at a Time

Through love, action, and unwavering faith, we bring hope and dignity to the most vulnerable.

Active Program
43 Children
Loved, cared for, and growing

Helping Hands for Children

We care for orphaned and poor children, providing housing, education, healthcare, and spiritual nurturing.

Learn More
Ongoing
Widows Care
Dignity, provision, and love

Widows Care Ministry

We support poor and elderly widows with care, provision, and community so they know they are not forgotten.

Learn More

Partner WithThis Ministry

Your generous gift directly transforms lives across children, widows, village churches, missionaries, and communities.

Fund a village church building
Sponsor an orphaned child
Support a widow with monthly care
Equip a native missionary
Give to the Ministry

Media Gallery

God's Workin Pictures

A glimpse of the ministry gallery: outreach, children, pastors, widows, and moments of grace from the field.

View Full Gallery
Leadership

Board ofDirectors

Meet Brother Jerry and Sister Debi Ayers, compassionate USA partners who helped establish transparent support for Savior's Heartbeat Ministries.

USA Liaison Office

Brother Jerry & Sister Debi Ayers

Faithful stewards who have supported the ministry with hospitality, prayer, accountability, and a heart for India.

1997 Partnership

Brother Jerry and Sister Debi Ayers welcomed Deva in the USA and stood with the vision for Savior's Heartbeat Ministries.

Transparent Stewardship

They helped establish Savior&apos;s Heartbeat USA with a registered IRS account and annual accountability.

Faithful Donor Care

Sister Debi serves donors by providing tax-deductible receipts and helping offerings reach India with care.

"Their generosity has enabled us to provide crucial aid to the poor and needy, addressing both physical and spiritual necessities."

Meet the Full Board
Connect With Us

We’d Love to
Hear From You

Whether you need prayer, want to support the ministry, or simply want to connect—our doors and hearts are open to you.

Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”
